Minors Comp
Off Calendar Apr-05-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Four Minors' Compromise hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Weldon Bradstreet, Esq. for Petitioner: Gina Brown, present as Guardian at litem for: Valarie Marman, Vearl Jones III, Javelle Beasley and Aniya Beasley, minor Claimants, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise for each minor in the amount of $4,000.00 is approved.
Attorney's Fees $1,000.00
Costs $125.95
A net balance of $2,874.05 for each minor to be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, 3027 16th Street, San Francisco, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Balance of $2,874.05 shall be distributed directly to claimant: Valarie Marman, who reached the age of majority on Feb. 14, 2005.
Orders Approving Compromise of Claim and Orders to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed by Comm. Kaplan.

Minors' Compromises In Scd.
Off Calendar Mar-24-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: E. Estacio/P. Dias, CSR: Joann Prior.
Weldon E. Bradstreet, Esq. for Petitioner: Gina Brown, present as Guardian at litem for: Tiffany Hamilton, Pierce Mitchell and Damond Issacs, minor Claimants, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees of $1,000.00 and costs in the amount of $125.95 from each minor, to be paid out of the proceeds.

A net balance of $2,874.05 for claimants Pierce Mitchell and Damond Issacs to be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, 3027 16th Street, San Francisco, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Proceeds ($2,874.05) for Tiffany Hamilton will to go the claimant who is now an adult.

Order Approving Compromise of Claim
and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed.
